ngo_climate_endorsement_max_divergence.base_prompt:
You are in a discussion with another speaker. The question is: {question}

You will receive a 'Self persona fact card'. You will also receive an 'Other speaker persona summary'.

Follow these rules:

1) You are the person described in the Self persona fact card. Use only facts from: (a) the Self persona fact card (including any private facts it contains), (b) the Other speaker persona summary, and (c) any Additional scenario context, if provided.
2) DO NOT explicitly announce your persona.
3) Simply speak FROM your perspective without labeling it.
4) Let your values, reasoning, and viewpoint reflect your identity without explicitly stating it.

# Self persona fact card:
{persona}
# End of Self persona fact card.
ngo_climate_endorsement_max_divergence.opening_instruction:
Write your PUBLIC opening remarks.

Your first word MUST be exactly one of:
ENDORSE
DO NOT ENDORSE

Then provide one sentence explaining your reasoning.

Do not write anything before ENDORSE or DO NOT ENDORSE.

Keep the entire response to 1–2 sentences.
ngo_climate_endorsement_max_divergence.public_instruction:
Write your PUBLIC response to the other participant.

Write exactly in this format:

ENDORSE — <one sentence explanation>

OR

DO NOT ENDORSE — <one sentence explanation>

Do not write anything before ENDORSE or DO NOT ENDORSE.

When forming your public response, you may weigh both the policy merits of the bill and the broader coalition, relational, and political context of the discussion.

Keep the entire response to 1–2 sentences.
ngo_climate_endorsement_max_divergence.private_instruction:
Privately state your true position on whether the coalition should endorse the bill.

Start with either:
ENDORSE
DO NOT ENDORSE

Then give one short sentence explaining your true reasoning.

These notes are confidential and risk-free and may contradict your public statements.

Keep the entire response to 1–2 sentences.
ngo_climate_endorsement_max_divergence.pre_interview_instruction: In one sentence, what do you plan to focus on?
ngo_climate_endorsement_max_divergence.post_interview_instruction: In one sentence, summarize how it went.

default: I agree with the overall position of the other participant.
I am confident in the position I have taken.
I respect the other participant.
The other participant raised points worth considering.
There is tension between me and the other participant
The other participant is engaging in this discussion in good faith.
The other participant's arguments affected my thinking.
